name: Rider-Waite-Smith Tarot
description: Complete 78-card tarot stack with Major Arcana (22 cards) and Minor Arcana (56 cards in four suits)

tokens.label: 0. The Fool
tokens.text: New beginnings, innocence, spontaneity, free spirit. The Fool stands at the precipice of adventure, unburdened by past or future.

meta.upright: New beginnings, innocence, free spirit, originality, adventure
meta.reversed: Recklessness, risk-taking, distraction, naivety, foolishness

tokens.label: I. The Magician
tokens.text: Manifestation, resourcefulness, power, inspired action. The Magician channels universal energy to manifest desires into reality.

meta.upright: Manifestation, resourcefulness, power, inspired action, mastery
meta.reversed: Manipulation, poor planning, untapped talents, illusion, trickery

tokens.label: II. The High Priestess
tokens.text: Intuition, sacred knowledge, divine feminine, the subconscious mind. She guards the threshold between the conscious and unconscious.

meta.upright: Intuition, sacred knowledge, divine feminine, the subconscious mind
meta.reversed: Secrets, disconnected from intuition, withdrawal, silence

tokens.label: III. The Empress
tokens.text: Femininity, beauty, nature, nurturing, abundance. The Empress embodies creation, fertility, and the flourishing of life.

meta.upright: Femininity, beauty, nature, nurturing, abundance, creativity
meta.reversed: Creative block, dependence on others, smothering, emptiness

tokens.label: IV. The Emperor
tokens.text: Authority, establishment, structure, father figure. The Emperor represents order, stability, and the power of rational thought.

meta.upright: Authority, establishment, structure, father figure, leadership
meta.reversed: Domination, excessive control, lack of discipline, inflexibility

tokens.label: V. The Hierophant
tokens.text: Spiritual wisdom, religious beliefs, conformity, tradition, institutions. The Hierophant is the keeper of sacred knowledge and tradition.

meta.upright: Spiritual wisdom, religious beliefs, conformity, tradition, institutions
meta.reversed: Personal beliefs, freedom, challenging the status quo, unconventional

tokens.label: VI. The Lovers
tokens.text: Love, harmony, relationships, values alignment, choices. The Lovers represent union, connection, and important decisions of the heart.

meta.upright: Love, harmony, relationships, values alignment, choices, partnerships
meta.reversed: Self-love, disharmony, imbalance, misalignment of values

tokens.label: VII. The Chariot
tokens.text: Control, willpower, success, action, determination. The Chariot symbolizes triumph through discipline and focused intention.

meta.upright: Control, willpower, success, action, determination, victory
meta.reversed: Lack of control, lack of direction, aggression, opposition

tokens.label: VIII. Strength
tokens.text: Strength, courage, persuasion, influence, compassion. True strength lies in gentle influence and inner fortitude.

meta.upright: Strength, courage, persuasion, influence, compassion, inner power
meta.reversed: Inner strength, self-doubt, low energy, raw emotion, weakness

tokens.label: IX. The Hermit
tokens.text: Soul searching, introspection, inner guidance, solitude. The Hermit walks the path of wisdom through quiet contemplation.

meta.upright: Soul searching, introspection, being alone, inner guidance, solitude
meta.reversed: Isolation, loneliness, withdrawal, paranoia, lack of guidance

tokens.label: X. Wheel of Fortune
tokens.text: Good luck, karma, life cycles, destiny, turning point. The Wheel turns eternally, bringing change and new opportunities.

meta.upright: Good luck, karma, life cycles, destiny, turning point, fortune
meta.reversed: Bad luck, resistance to change, breaking cycles, lack of control

tokens.label: XI. Justice
tokens.text: Justice, fairness, truth, cause and effect, law. Justice represents balance, accountability, and karmic consequence.

meta.upright: Justice, fairness, truth, cause and effect, law, karma
meta.reversed: Unfairness, lack of accountability, dishonesty, legal complications

tokens.label: XII. The Hanged Man
tokens.text: Pause, surrender, letting go, new perspectives. The Hanged Man sees the world differently through willing sacrifice.

meta.upright: Pause, surrender, letting go, new perspectives, sacrifice
meta.reversed: Delays, resistance, stalling, indecision, avoiding sacrifice

tokens.label: XIII. Death
tokens.text: Endings, change, transformation, transition. Death marks profound transformation and the completion of cycles.

meta.upright: Endings, change, transformation, transition, letting go
meta.reversed: Resistance to change, personal transformation, inner purging

tokens.label: XIV. Temperance
tokens.text: Balance, moderation, patience, purpose, meaning. Temperance blends opposing forces into harmonious synthesis.

meta.upright: Balance, moderation, patience, purpose, meaning, tranquility
meta.reversed: Imbalance, excess, self-healing, re-alignment, lack of patience

tokens.label: XV. The Devil
tokens.text: Shadow self, attachment, addiction, restriction, sexuality. The Devil represents bondage to material and illusory constraints.

meta.upright: Shadow self, attachment, addiction, restriction, sexuality, materialism
meta.reversed: Releasing limiting beliefs, exploring dark thoughts, detachment

tokens.label: XVI. The Tower
tokens.text: Sudden change, upheaval, chaos, revelation, awakening. The Tower brings sudden collapse of false structures.

meta.upright: Sudden change, upheaval, chaos, revelation, awakening, disruption
meta.reversed: Personal transformation, fear of change, averting disaster

tokens.label: XVII. The Star
tokens.text: Hope, faith, purpose, renewal, spirituality. The Star offers healing light after the Tower's destruction.

meta.upright: Hope, faith, purpose, renewal, spirituality, inspiration
meta.reversed: Lack of faith, despair, self-trust, disconnection, hopelessness

tokens.label: XVIII. The Moon
tokens.text: Illusion, fear, anxiety, subconscious, intuition. The Moon illuminates the hidden realms of dreams and shadow.

meta.upright: Illusion, fear, anxiety, subconscious, intuition, mystery
meta.reversed: Release of fear, repressed emotion, inner confusion, unveiling secrets

tokens.label: XIX. The Sun
tokens.text: Positivity, fun, warmth, success, vitality. The Sun brings radiant joy, clarity, and celebration of life.

meta.upright: Positivity, fun, warmth, success, vitality, joy, enlightenment
meta.reversed: Inner child, feeling down, overly optimistic, temporary depression

tokens.label: XX. Judgement
tokens.text: Judgement, rebirth, inner calling, absolution. Judgement calls for reflection, evaluation, and spiritual awakening.

meta.upright: Judgement, rebirth, inner calling, absolution, self-evaluation
meta.reversed: Self-doubt, inner critic, ignoring the call, self-loathing

tokens.label: XXI. The World
tokens.text: Completion, integration, accomplishment, travel. The World represents wholeness, fulfillment, and cosmic unity.

meta.upright: Completion, integration, accomplishment, travel, unity, fulfillment
meta.reversed: Seeking personal closure, short-cuts, delays, lack of completion

tokens.label: Ace of Wands
tokens.text: Inspiration, new opportunities, growth, potential. The Ace of Wands ignites creative fire and passionate beginnings.

meta.upright: Inspiration, new opportunities, growth, potential, creativity
meta.reversed: An emerging idea, lack of direction, distractions, delays

tokens.label: Two of Wands
tokens.text: Future planning, progress, decisions, discovery. Standing at a crossroads, contemplating future possibilities.

meta.upright: Future planning, progress, decisions, discovery, personal power
meta.reversed: Personal goals, inner alignment, fear of unknown, lack of planning

tokens.label: Three of Wands
tokens.text: Progress, expansion, foresight, overseas opportunities. Looking ahead with optimism and expanding horizons.

meta.upright: Progress, expansion, foresight, overseas opportunities, growth
meta.reversed: Playing small, lack of foresight, unexpected delays, obstacles

tokens.label: Four of Wands
tokens.text: Celebration, harmony, marriage, home, community. A joyful gathering marking achievement and stability.

meta.upright: Celebration, joy, harmony, relaxation, homecoming, community
meta.reversed: Personal celebration, inner harmony, conflict with others, transition

tokens.label: Five of Wands
tokens.text: Conflict, competition, tension, diversity. Navigating disagreement and competing interests with vigor.

meta.upright: Conflict, disagreements, competition, tension, diversity of opinion
meta.reversed: Inner conflict, conflict avoidance, releasing tension, cooperation

tokens.label: Six of Wands
tokens.text: Success, public recognition, progress, self-confidence. Victory and acknowledgment after overcoming challenges.

meta.upright: Success, public recognition, progress, self-confidence, victory
meta.reversed: Private achievement, personal definition of success, fall from grace

tokens.label: Seven of Wands
tokens.text: Challenge, competition, perseverance, defense. Standing your ground despite opposition and pressure.

meta.upright: Challenge, competition, protection, perseverance, courage
meta.reversed: Exhaustion, giving up, overwhelmed, lack of confidence

tokens.label: Eight of Wands
tokens.text: Movement, fast paced change, action, alignment. Swift progress and things falling rapidly into place.

meta.upright: Movement, fast paced change, action, alignment, travel
meta.reversed: Delays, frustration, resisting change, internal alignment

tokens.label: Nine of Wands
tokens.text: Resilience, courage, persistence, test of faith. Battle-worn but still standing, ready for the final challenge.

meta.upright: Resilience, courage, persistence, test of faith, boundaries
meta.reversed: Inner resources, struggle, overwhelm, defensive, paranoia

tokens.label: Ten of Wands
tokens.text: Burden, extra responsibility, hard work, completion. Carrying a heavy load but nearing the end of a cycle.

meta.upright: Burden, extra responsibility, hard work, completion, overwhelm
meta.reversed: Doing it all, release, delegation, prioritization, lightening load

tokens.label: Page of Wands
tokens.text: Exploration, excitement, freedom, discovery. The Page brings messages of adventure and creative inspiration.

meta.upright: Exploration, excitement, freedom, discovery, new ideas
meta.reversed: Lack of direction, procrastination, creating conflict, setbacks

tokens.label: Knight of Wands
tokens.text: Energy, passion, inspired action, adventure, impulsiveness. Charging forward with fiery enthusiasm.

meta.upright: Energy, passion, inspired action, adventure, impulsiveness
meta.reversed: Passion project, haste, scattered energy, delays, frustration

tokens.label: Queen of Wands
tokens.text: Courage, confidence, independence, social butterfly, determination. She radiates warmth and magnetic charisma.

meta.upright: Courage, confidence, independence, social butterfly, determination
meta.reversed: Self-respect, self-confidence, introverted, re-establish sense of self

tokens.label: King of Wands
tokens.text: Natural leader, vision, entrepreneur, honour. He commands with creative vision and dynamic leadership.

meta.upright: Natural leader, vision, entrepreneur, honour, confidence
meta.reversed: Impulsiveness, haste, ruthless, high expectations, lack of direction

tokens.label: Ace of Cups
tokens.text: Love, new relationships, compassion, creativity. The Ace of Cups overflows with emotional and spiritual abundance.

meta.upright: Love, new relationships, compassion, creativity, emotional abundance
meta.reversed: Self-love, intuition, repressed emotions, creative block

tokens.label: Two of Cups
tokens.text: Unified love, partnership, mutual attraction. A harmonious connection and balanced relationship.

meta.upright: Unified love, partnership, mutual attraction, unity, connection
meta.reversed: Self-love, break-up, disharmony, distrust, imbalance

tokens.label: Three of Cups
tokens.text: Celebration, friendship, creativity, collaborations. Joyful gathering and community support.

meta.upright: Celebration, friendship, creativity, collaborations, community
meta.reversed: Independence, alone time, hardcore partying, 'three's a crowd'

tokens.label: Four of Cups
tokens.text: Meditation, contemplation, apathy, reevaluation. Withdrawing inward to reassess values and opportunities.

meta.upright: Meditation, contemplation, apathy, reevaluation, boredom
meta.reversed: Retreat, withdrawal, checking in for alignment, new perspectives

tokens.label: Five of Cups
tokens.text: Regret, failure, disappointment, pessimism. Focusing on loss while failing to see remaining blessings.

meta.upright: Regret, failure, disappointment, pessimism, loss, grief
meta.reversed: Personal setbacks, self-forgiveness, moving on, acceptance

tokens.label: Six of Cups
tokens.text: Revisiting the past, childhood memories, innocence, joy. Nostalgia and the sweetness of simpler times.

meta.upright: Revisiting the past, childhood memories, innocence, joy, nostalgia
meta.reversed: Living in the past, forgiveness, lacking playfulness, moving forward

tokens.label: Seven of Cups
tokens.text: Opportunities, choices, wishful thinking, illusion. Many options but clarity is needed to discern truth.

meta.upright: Opportunities, choices, wishful thinking, illusion, fantasy
meta.reversed: Alignment, personal values, overwhelmed by choices, clarity

tokens.label: Eight of Cups
tokens.text: Disappointment, abandonment, withdrawal, escapism. Walking away from what no longer serves the soul.

meta.upright: Disappointment, abandonment, withdrawal, escapism, seeking truth
meta.reversed: Trying one more time, indecision, aimless drifting, fear of change

tokens.label: Nine of Cups
tokens.text: Contentment, satisfaction, gratitude, wish come true. Deep fulfillment and emotional satisfaction.

meta.upright: Contentment, satisfaction, gratitude, wish come true, luxury
meta.reversed: Inner happiness, materialism, dissatisfaction, indulgence

tokens.label: Ten of Cups
tokens.text: Divine love, blissful relationships, harmony, alignment. Perfect emotional fulfillment and family joy.

meta.upright: Divine love, blissful relationships, harmony, alignment, family
meta.reversed: Disconnection, misaligned values, struggling relationships, disharmony

tokens.label: Page of Cups
tokens.text: Creative opportunities, intuitive messages, curiosity, possibility. The Page brings emotional and creative news.

meta.upright: Creative opportunities, intuitive messages, curiosity, possibility
meta.reversed: New ideas, doubting intuition, creative blocks, emotional immaturity

tokens.label: Knight of Cups
tokens.text: Creativity, romance, charm, imagination, beauty. The Knight offers romantic proposals and artistic vision.

meta.upright: Creativity, romance, charm, imagination, beauty, idealism
meta.reversed: Overactive imagination, unrealistic, jealous, moody, disappointment

tokens.label: Queen of Cups
tokens.text: Compassionate, caring, emotionally sspace, intuitive, in flow. She embodies emotional maturity and deep empathy.

meta.upright: Compassionate, caring, emotionally sspace, intuitive, in flow
meta.reversed: Inner feelings, self-care, self-love, co-dependency, emotional insecurity

tokens.label: King of Cups
tokens.text: Emotionally balanced, compassionate, diplomatic. He masters emotions through wisdom and understanding.

meta.upright: Emotionally balanced, compassionate, diplomatic, caring, wise
meta.reversed: Self-compassion, inner feelings, moodiness, emotionally manipulative

tokens.label: Ace of Swords
tokens.text: Breakthroughs, new ideas, mental clarity, success. The Ace of Swords cuts through confusion with truth.

meta.upright: Breakthroughs, new ideas, mental clarity, success, truth
meta.reversed: Inner clarity, re-thinking an idea, clouded judgement, confusion

tokens.label: Two of Swords
tokens.text: Difficult decisions, weighing options, an impasse, avoidance. Blindfolded and balanced between two choices.

meta.upright: Difficult decisions, weighing options, an impasse, avoidance
meta.reversed: Indecision, confusion, information overload, stalemate continues

tokens.label: Three of Swords
tokens.text: Heartbreak, emotional pain, sorrow, grief, hurt. The piercing pain of betrayal or loss.

meta.upright: Heartbreak, emotional pain, sorrow, grief, hurt, betrayal
meta.reversed: Negative self-talk, releasing pain, optimism, forgiveness, healing

tokens.label: Four of Swords
tokens.text: Rest, relaxation, meditation, contemplation, recuperation. A necessary pause for healing and renewal.

meta.upright: Rest, relaxation, meditation, contemplation, recuperation
meta.reversed: Exhaustion, burn-out, deep contemplation, stagnation, rest

tokens.label: Five of Swords
tokens.text: Conflict, disagreements, competition, defeat, winning at all costs. Victory that feels hollow or cruel.

meta.upright: Conflict, disagreements, competition, defeat, winning at all costs
meta.reversed: Reconciliation, making amends, past resentment, desire for peace

tokens.label: Six of Swords
tokens.text: Transition, change, rite of passage, releasing baggage. Moving away from difficulty toward calmer waters.

meta.upright: Transition, change, rite of passage, releasing baggage, travel
meta.reversed: Personal transition, resistance to change, unfinished business

tokens.label: Seven of Swords
tokens.text: Betrayal, deception, getting away with something, acting strategically. Cunning action and secret plans.

meta.upright: Betrayal, deception, getting away with something, acting strategically
meta.reversed: Imposter syndrome, self-deceit, keeping secrets, coming clean

tokens.label: Eight of Swords
tokens.text: Negative thoughts, self-imposed restriction, imprisonment, victim mentality. Feeling trapped by limiting beliefs.

meta.upright: Negative thoughts, self-imposed restriction, imprisonment, victim mentality
meta.reversed: Self-limiting beliefs, inner critic, releasing negative thoughts, freedom

tokens.label: Nine of Swords
tokens.text: Anxiety, worry, fear, depression, nightmares. Mental anguish and sleepless nights filled with worry.

meta.upright: Anxiety, worry, fear, depression, nightmares, mental torment
meta.reversed: Inner turmoil, deep-seated fears, secrets, releasing worry, hope

tokens.label: Ten of Swords
tokens.text: Painful endings, deep wounds, betrayal, loss, crisis. Rock bottom, but the only way forward is up.

meta.upright: Painful endings, deep wounds, betrayal, loss, crisis, rock bottom
meta.reversed: Recovery, regeneration, resisting an inevispace end, fear of ruin

tokens.label: Page of Swords
tokens.text: New ideas, curiosity, thirst for knowledge, new ways of communicating. The Page brings mental agility and curiosity.

meta.upright: New ideas, curiosity, thirst for knowledge, new ways of communicating
meta.reversed: Self-expression, all talk and no action, haphazard action, haste

tokens.label: Knight of Swords
tokens.text: Ambitious, action-oriented, driven to succeed, fast-thinking. Charging forward with intellectual intensity.

meta.upright: Ambitious, action-oriented, driven to succeed, fast-thinking
meta.reversed: Restless, unfocused, impulsive, burn-out, high expectations

tokens.label: Queen of Swords
tokens.text: Independent, unbiased judgement, clear boundaries, direct communication. She speaks truth with clarity and precision.

meta.upright: Independent, unbiased judgement, clear boundaries, direct communication
meta.reversed: Overly-emotional, easily influenced, bitchy, cold-hearted, cruel

tokens.label: King of Swords
tokens.text: Mental clarity, intellectual power, authority, truth. He rules through logic, reason, and ethical judgment.

meta.upright: Mental clarity, intellectual power, authority, truth, reason
meta.reversed: Quiet power, inner truth, misuse of power, manipulation, tyranny

tokens.label: Ace of Pentacles
tokens.text: A new financial or career opportunity, manifestation, abundance. The Ace of Pentacles brings material promise.

meta.upright: A new financial or career opportunity, manifestation, abundance
meta.reversed: Lost opportunity, missed chance, bad investment, lack of planning

tokens.label: Two of Pentacles
tokens.text: Multiple priorities, time management, prioritisation, adaptability. Juggling responsibilities with grace and flexibility.

meta.upright: Multiple priorities, time management, prioritisation, adaptability
meta.reversed: Over-committed, disorganisation, reprioritisation, overwhelm

tokens.label: Three of Pentacles
tokens.text: Teamwork, collaboration, learning, implementation. Building something of lasting value through skilled cooperation.

meta.upright: Teamwork, collaboration, learning, implementation, skill
meta.reversed: Disharmony, misalignment, working alone, lack of accountability

tokens.label: Four of Pentacles
tokens.text: Saving money, security, conservatism, scarcity, control. Holding tightly to material possessions and security.

meta.upright: Saving money, security, conservatism, scarcity, control, greed
meta.reversed: Over-spending, greed, self-protection, financial insecurity

tokens.label: Five of Pentacles
tokens.text: Financial loss, poverty, lack mindset, isolation, worry. Hardship and feeling left out in the cold.

meta.upright: Financial loss, poverty, lack mindset, isolation, worry, insecurity
meta.reversed: Recovery from financial loss, spiritual poverty, positive changes

tokens.label: Six of Pentacles
tokens.text: Giving, receiving, sharing wealth, generosity, charity. The flow of abundance through giving and receiving.

meta.upright: Giving, receiving, sharing wealth, generosity, charity, fairness
meta.reversed: Self-care, unpaid debts, one-sided charity, strings attached

tokens.label: Seven of Pentacles
tokens.text: Long-term view, sustainable results, perseverance, investment. Pausing to assess progress and future potential.

meta.upright: Long-term view, sustainable results, perseverance, investment
meta.reversed: Lack of long-term vision, limited success, impatience, frustration

tokens.label: Eight of Pentacles
tokens.text: Apprenticeship, repetitive tasks, mastery, skill development. Dedication to craft and continuous improvement.

meta.upright: Apprenticeship, repetitive tasks, mastery, skill development
meta.reversed: Self-development, perfectionism, misdirected activity, mediocrity

tokens.label: Nine of Pentacles
tokens.text: Abundance, luxury, self-sufficiency, financial independence. Enjoying the fruits of one's labor in solitude.

meta.upright: Abundance, luxury, self-sufficiency, financial independence
meta.reversed: Self-worth, over-investment in work, hustling, setbacks

tokens.label: Ten of Pentacles
tokens.text: Wealth, financial security, family, long-term success, contribution. Generational prosperity and lasting legacy.

meta.upright: Wealth, financial security, family, long-term success, contribution
meta.reversed: The dark side of wealth, financial failure, loneliness, loss

tokens.label: Page of Pentacles
tokens.text: Manifestation, financial opportunity, skill development. The Page brings news of practical opportunities.

meta.upright: Manifestation, financial opportunity, skill development, ambition
meta.reversed: Lack of progress, procrastination, learn from failure, bad investment

tokens.label: Knight of Pentacles
tokens.text: Hard work, productivity, routine, conservatism, perfection. The Knight approaches work methodically and reliably.

meta.upright: Hard work, productivity, routine, conservatism, perfection
meta.reversed: Self-discipline, boredom, feeling 'stuck', perfectionism, laziness

tokens.label: Queen of Pentacles
tokens.text: Nurturing, practical, providing financially, a working parent. She creates abundance through grounded wisdom.

meta.upright: Nurturing, practical, providing financially, a working parent
meta.reversed: Financial independence, self-care, work-home conflict, smothering

tokens.label: King of Pentacles
tokens.text: Wealth, business, leadership, security, discipline, abundance. He embodies mastery of the material world.

meta.upright: Wealth, business, leadership, security, discipline, abundance
meta.reversed: Financially inept, obsessed with wealth, stubborn, greed, materialistic
